name: archives
description: Gestione di materiale archivistico e fotografico seguendo gli standard internazionali ISAD(G) (General International Standard Archival Description), ISAAR(CPF) (authority record per persone, enti, famiglie) e RiC-O (Records in Contexts Ontology, ICA 2023). Modello gerarchico a 4 livelli — Fondo → Serie → Fascicolo → Unità — con export Linked Data RiC-O JSON-LD per harvester ICA, Europeana, ArchivesPortalEurope. Ispirato al formato ABA (Arbejderbevægelsens Bibliotek og Arkiv, Copenhagen) e a ARKIS II degli Archivi Nazionali Svedesi.
changelog: v1.6.0: Phase 4 of RiC-CM support (issue #122, v0.7.10) — Places + polymorphic Relations graph. New tables archive_places (geographic entity with GeoNames/Wikidata/Getty TGN identifiers, self-ref parent_id for hierarchy, optional lat/lng + historical date range) and archive_relations (polymorphic N:M between any pair of archival_unit/authority_record/archive_activity/archive_place, typed by RiC-O predicate with certainty + qualifier + date range). Two new public endpoints: /archives/places/{id}/ric.json and /archives/places/ric.json. RicJsonLdBuilder.buildPlace emits ric:Place + ric:CoordinateLocation + owl:sameAs (GeoNames/Wikidata/TGN); buildRelationNode renders any archive_relations row as a ric:Relation with deterministic IRI. validateRelationEndpoints provides application-layer FK integrity for the polymorphic source/target. v1.5.0: Phase 3 Activities.
author: Fabiodalez

features: Modello gerarchico a 4 livelli (Fonds / Series / File / Item)
Import/export MARCXML (formato ABA / MARC21 Slim) + validazione XSD
SRU 1.2 endpoint (explain / searchRetrieve / scan) per federated search
Materiale fotografico e audiovisivo (ABA billedmarc — 15 codici material-form)
Export RiC-O JSON-LD (Records in Contexts Ontology, ICA 2023) per harvester Linked Data
